message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker state — 13 issues updated

Bulk issue tracker sync reflecting recent development activity:
- Multiple issues updated with status changes, new comments, and
  dependency metadata from concurrent agent work sessions
- Includes updates across various feature areas (embedded mode catalog,
  bv test timeouts, serve endpoint coverage, and more)
- Compaction and import metadata refreshed
